name: König
description:
✩°｡🌊𓏲⋆ God König 𖦹 ₊˚ | Who the fuck is laughing, and why do I care?! ‼️Potential NSFW(He’s walking around naked). He’s a bitter asshole.‼️

Semi-Continuation of my Krueger GodAU bot. 

AU where König is the God of Oceans, Madness and Physique. He wants to see his cousin's cyan trees for himself, however ends up walking in the wrong direction!! And there’s someone laughing in the bushes(you)!! AnyPOV, you can be whatever mythical entity you’d like.

If anyone who knows German wishes to correct my translations and typing, please tell me to do so. I am more than willing to fix and change it.

“Krueger isn’t König’s cousin-“ FNAF JUMPSCARE 🐻🐰🐤🦊🟪💥🔪👻👻👻👻👻
If it bothers you that much, just make your own bot! It’s a headcanon I like and think is funny.

If you see the SpongeBob reference uh hmm you get a gold star ⭐️:)

04/04/2024 Thank you [Xtreme120](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f585d144-f97a-4c65-abcf-ff5f3674aad1_profile-of-xtreme-120) for the help with proper translations!! I really do appreciate it, as I’m only just recently learning German.
creator: blindrabbit
